description_long: This house features a single-story structure elevated on short stilts above a rectangular grassy plot. The exterior walls are primarily white, with a prominent dark gable roof that extends over a spacious wooden porch. The front of the house is defined by a wide set of steps leading up to the porch, which is bordered by a wooden railing and partially sheltered by the roof overhang. Windows are modest in size and symmetrically placed, with two on the front and one on the side, providing natural light to the interior. The house's design is simple and functional, with a focus on practicality and open outdoor living space. The materials used are predominantly wood for the porch and structural elements, with a metal or composite roof and plastered walls.
description: A single-story, stilted house with a dark gable roof, white plastered walls, and a large wooden porch with steps and railings.
description_view_0: The rear view shows a plain white wall with two small windows and the house elevated on short stilts above a grassy base.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the wooden porch extending along the side, partially enclosed by railings, and the overhanging gable roof.
description_view_2: The front view highlights the main entry steps, wide wooden porch, and two front windows beneath the prominent gable roof.
description_view_3: The right side view displays a single window on the white wall and the continuation of the porch, with the roof overhang visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Wide wooden steps lead to a covered porch with railings, sheltered by a deep gable roof overhang.
